evals.prompt: I am conducting a security audit of an e-commerce platform with a shopping cart, online payment (Alipay/WeChat), order management, and refund flow. Help me create a security test plan for the payment and order flow, down to each test point and test step.
evals.expected_output: A detailed test plan covering payment tampering, order-state-machine bypass, race conditions, refund logic, and related areas; it should include concrete test steps, expected results, and WooYun case references

assertions.text: Includes at least 2 concrete real WooYun case references (company name + vulnerability description)
Includes quantitative statistics (case count or high-risk percentage)
Covers at least 5 different payment/order attack patterns
Each test point includes concrete executable test steps

evals.prompt: Our company has a multi-tenant SaaS platform that provides REST APIs to web and mobile clients. I need you to design a complete authorization-bypass test plan covering horizontal authorization bypass (IDOR), vertical authorization bypass (privilege escalation), and unauthorized access. It should be directly usable.
evals.expected_output: A systematic authorization test plan covering IDOR testing protocols, vertical privilege escalation, unauthorized endpoint discovery, arbitrary-operation testing, and concrete API test cases

assertions.text: Includes at least 2 concrete real WooYun case references (company name + vulnerability description)
Includes quantitative statistics (case count or high-risk percentage)
IDOR testing covers at least 4 ID-manipulation techniques
Clearly distinguishes the three dimensions: horizontal authorization bypass, vertical authorization bypass, and unauthorized access
Includes concrete REST API test cases

evals.prompt: Help me perform a comprehensive business-logic security assessment for a mobile banking app. The app includes transfers, top-ups, withdrawals, wealth-product purchases, password reset, real-name verification, and related features. Output a complete security test report template that I can use directly.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive banking-app security assessment report template covering all six domains: authentication, authorization, financial, information disclosure, logic flow, and configuration

assertions.text: Includes at least 3 concrete real WooYun case references (company name + vulnerability description)
Includes quantitative statistics (case count or high-risk percentage)
Covers all 6 domains (authentication, authorization, financial, information disclosure, logic flow, configuration)
Each banking function has corresponding test items
Output format is a directly usable report template
Includes architecture-level and code-level defense recommendations
